# ProcessReporter v1.7.2

## Highlights

- Replaced the custom menu bar popover with a compact native macOS menu for sharing controls, current Presence, destination health, and Settings shortcuts.
- Refined Destinations settings with grouped destination rows that can be opened repeatedly without persistent list selection.
- Moved destination navigation into each editor and added confirmation before leaving an unsaved draft.

## Fixes and reliability

- Clarified when replacement credentials are pending and renamed the primary action to Save Changes.
- Prevented unsupported one-character Discord activity text from causing Rich Presence delivery failures while preserving valid one-character asset identifiers.

## Update notes

- This release supports Apple Silicon (arm64) only.
